description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named BuildSharedLibrary that runs on push to master, develop, actions_shared branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master and develop. Use a matrix job that runs on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest to check out the repository with submodules, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, extract the CoolProp version, configure CMake, build the shared library, and archive the resulting tarball artifact. Upload the artifact to a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
